_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Applying statistical and analytical techniques involves using and evaluating methods to answer research questions and make data-informed recommendations.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business question, balancing statistical rigor, time constraints, data availability, and audience comprehension capacity.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.544), AB-K-004 (AB, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [analytical, data, statistical]. DDaT-only terms [answer, applying, evaluating, informed, involves, methods] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, appropriate, audience, availability, balancing, business] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.855, R=0.846). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DDaT element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Applying statistical and analytical techniques involves using and evaluating met" and "Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business questio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 ≈ STS 0.566 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analytical, data, statistical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [analytical, data, statistical]. DDaT-only: [answer, applying, evaluating, informed, involves, methods]. WIDAI-only: [ability, appropriate, audience, availability, balancing, business].
